compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement archived exclusion in ticket-graph.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Implement archived exclusion in ticket-graph.py:
(a) Add exclude_archived: bool = True parameter to _find_direct_blockers() and _compute_dep_graph(). When True, skip entries where state.get('archived') is True in directory scans.
(b) Wire through build_dep_graph() → _compute_dep_graph() → _find_direct_blockers().
(c) In _get_all_blocked_by() BFS: do NOT skip archived tickets mid-chain — they must be traversed for accurate transitive blocker detection. Only exclude archived as scan entry points.
(d) Add --include-archived flag to CLI main(). When present, set exclude_archived=False and pass to build_dep_graph.
(e) In CLI deps mode: before building graph, reduce the target ticket and check state.get('archived'). If archived and --include-archived not passed, print error: "Error: ticket '<id>' is archived. Use --include-archived to include archived tickets." and exit 1.
(f) Preserve compute_archive_eligible's exclude_archived=False — no change needed there.

**Why**: GREEN phase — make Task 3's RED tests pass.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py (modify functions, add CLI flag)
- .test-index (remove RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Task 3's RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] mypy passes on ticket-graph.py
  Verify: mypy plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
- [ ] compute_archive_eligible still uses exclude_archived=False
  Verify: grep -A5 'def compute_archive_eligible' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py | grep -q 'exclude_archived=False'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed for ticket-graph.py
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-graph.py.*\[test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
